name: voyant-booking-requirements-question-option-dialog
title: Question Option Dialog
description: Create/edit dialog for choice options on select-style booking questions.

files.content:
import type { BookingQuestionOption } from "@voyantjs/booking-requirements-react" import { Loader2 } from "lucide-react" import { useEffect } from "react" import { useForm } from "react-hook-form" import { z } from "zod/v4" import { Button, Dialog, DialogBody, DialogContent, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, Input, Label, Switch, } from "@/components/ui" import { api } from "@/lib/api-client" import { zodResolver } from "@/lib/zod-resolver" const formSchema = z.object({ value: z.string().min(1, "Value is required").max(255), label: z.string().min(1, "Label is required").max(255), sortOrder: z.coerce.number().int(), isDefault: z.boolean(), active: z.boolean(), }) type FormValues = z.input type FormOutput = z.output export interface QuestionOptionDialogProps { open: boolean onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void questionId: string option?: BookingQuestionOption nextSortOrder?: number onSuccess: () => void } export function QuestionOptionDialog({ open, onOpenChange, questionId, option, nextSortOrder, onSuccess, }: QuestionOptionDialogProps) { const isEditing = !!option const form = useForm({ resolver: zodResolver(formSchema), defaultValues: { value: "", label: "", sortOrder: 0, isDefault: false, active: true, }, }) useEffect(() => { if (open && option) { form.reset({ value: option.value, label: option.label, sortOrder: option.sortOrder, isDefault: option.isDefault, active: option.active, }) } else if (open) { form.reset({ value: "", label: "", sortOrder: nextSortOrder ?? 0, isDefault: false, active: true, }) } }, [form, nextSortOrder, open, option]) const onSubmit = async (values: FormOutput) => { const payload = { productBookingQuestionId: questionId, value: values.value, label: values.label, sortOrder: values.sortOrder, isDefault: values.isDefault, active: values.active, } if (isEditing) { await api.patch(`/v1/booking-requirements/question-options/${option.id}`, payload) } else { await api.post("/v1/booking-requirements/question-options", payload) } onSuccess() } return ( {isEditing ? "Edit Choice" : "Add Choice"}
{form.formState.errors.value ? (

{form.formState.errors.value.message}

) : null}
{form.formState.errors.label ? (

{form.formState.errors.label.message}

) : null}
form.setValue("isDefault", value)} />
form.setValue("active", value)} />
) }
